name: @researchcomputer/agents-sdk
description: Coding agent SDK built on pi-ai and pi-agent-core

scripts.test:lint-core: ! grep -rE "from ['\"]node:" --include="*.ts" --exclude="*.test.ts" src/core/ || { echo 'node: import found in src/core/ (non-test)'; exit 1; }
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); if(JSON.stringify(p.dependencies).includes('file:')) { console.error('ERROR: file: dependencies found — publish the ai-provider fork first'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build:wasm:componentize: jco componentize examples/python-stub/dist/core.bundle.js --wit examples/python-stub/wasm/world.wit --world-name rc-agent-core --out examples/python-stub/dist/core.wasm
scripts.build:wasm: bun run build:wasm:bundle && bun run build:wasm:componentize
scripts.build:wasm:python:componentize: jco componentize src/python/flash_agents/wasm/core.bundle.js --wit src/python/wit/world.wit --world-name flash-agent-core --out src/python/flash_agents/wasm/core.wasm --enable stdio
scripts.build:wasm:python: bun run build:wasm:python:bundle && bun run build:wasm:python:componentize && bun run build:wasm:python:sha
